title: Argon Tableware Black Rectangular Serving Tray 56 x 41cm - Reusable Non Slip Rubberized Surface Platter for Food and Drinks - Durable Heat Resistant Stackable Tray for Bars, Restaurants and Home Use
features: 🍽️ Superior Non-Slip Grip for Safe Serving - The Argon Tableware 56 x 41cm rectangular tray features a textured Rubberized surface that prevents slipping, keeping plates, glasses, and drinks secure during transport in homes or restaurants.

🔥 Heat-Resistant Professional Build - Crafted from durable, professional-grade plastic, this heat-resistant serving tray allows you to safely carry hot dishes from kitchen to table, ideal for busy households, cafés, or catering events.

🧺 Spacious & Practical Design - With generous 56cm x 41cm dimensions and a 2cm rim, this non-slip tray offers ample serving space for dishes, appetisers, or drinks—perfect for family gatherings, events, and restaurant service.

💪 Stackable & Easy to Clean - Designed for practicality, this rectangular serving tray stacks neatly for compact storage and is dishwasher-safe for effortless cleaning—ideal for fast-paced kitchens or commercial service areas.

✨ Perfect for Home or Professional Use - Combining safety, durability, and style, this reusable serving tray suits any occasion—from family dinners to restaurant service—making it a reliable, long-lasting catering essential.
description: Effortlessly transport dishes and drinks with the Argon Tableware Rectangle Non-Slip Serving Tray, the ultimate solution for secure serving in both home and professional settings. Designed with functionality and durability in mind, this tray is ideal for families, dinner parties, and bustling restaurants alike. Its textured rubberized surface provides exceptional grip, preventing items from slipping or shifting, while the raised 2cm rim adds extra stability to keep everything neatly in place. Constructed from professional-grade materials, this serving tray is heat-resistant, making it perfect for handling hot foods straight from the kitchen. Its stackable design allows for convenient storage, and cleanup is a breeze—simply pop it into the dishwasher. With its sleek, practical design, the tray is available in multiple sizes, including a 14"x18" rectangular style that offers ample space for serving a variety of dishes and beverages. Whether you're hosting at home or running a busy dining establishment, the Argon Tableware Serving Tray ensures safety, style, and ease of use. Keep spills at bay and serve with confidence—order your tray today and upgrade your serving experience! Dimensions: Width 56cm, Depth 41cm, Height 2cm.
